title: Joeyan Christmas Crystal Stemless Wine Glasses, Hand Painted Red White Wine Glass Tumbler Cup, Large Red Xmas Tree Snowflakes Decorations Patterned Drinking Glasses Glassware Gifts, 560ML, Set of 2
features: Hand-Painted Holiday Design: Celebrate the winter season with our cute stemless wine glasses featuring artisan hand-painted red Christmas trees and white snowflakes. The wine cup’s pattern is adorned with shimmering powder, glistening like freshly fallen snow. Unlike mass-produced printed designs, each glass is a unique masterpiece that adds a touch of hand painted elegance to your holiday table.

Traditional Mouth Blown Craftsmanship: The modern technology of making a glassware by machine is fast and efficient. However, the traditional way of making a glassware by mouth and hand is more of an art. Each Joeyan wine glass cup was carefully handmade by skilled blowers. No two pieces are exactly the same, making each piece a little different in size and shape, but also making each piece the only one in the world.

Large Capacity and Premium Crystal Glass: This premium 19 oz wine glass has a mouth diameter of 2.8 inch and a height of 4.92 inch. The large capacity is suitable to provide you with a great drinking experience. Crafted from lead-free premium crystal glass, these glasses offer great clarity to enhance your wine's color and aroma. The thin yet durable rim provides a smooth drinking experience. To better delay the life of the cup, we recommend hand washing.

Great Gift Idea: Good for white or red wine, Burgundy, Cabernet, Sauvignon, Chardonnay.And also a good present for Christmas to lovers, fathers, mothers, other family members, friends, and those who you love. Celebrate life's most memorable moments with a gift that speaks for itself.

Hassle Free Purchase: If you follow the instructions but still have a problem, please try to contact us. Joeyan is an honest supplier with reputation. Any question or unsatisfied, please contact us via "Contact Seller". We will reply within 24 hours with proposed solutions to solve your problem till you are satisfied.
description: Product Description Joeyan Christmas Wine Glasses: Hand-Painted Holiday Elegance Elevate your Christmas celebrations with these exquisite hand-painted wine glasses. Each goblet features charming Christmas trees and snowflakes, crafted by skilled artisans. Perfect for serving your favourite wines or as a thoughtful gift, these unique glasses bring festive cheer to any occasion. Lead-free Wine Glasses, Smooth Edge. The glasses we have used are lead free, safe for your health. The edge of the cup is smooth and the overall color is bright, which is very eye-catching. Unique Design The drinking glass features hand-painted Christmas trees and white snowflakes with a sparkling effect, making it distinctive and eye-catching. It is equally suitable for serving red wine, white wine, beer, cocktails, fruit juice or other beverages. Ideal Gifts and Add A Touch of Holiday Magic To Any Table Each Christmas glass cup is a unique masterpiece that brings festive cheer to your celebrations. They make the perfect gift for friends, family and colleagues, and are an excellent choice for Christmas dinners, holiday gatherings and winter festivities!
